IPL 2026: Mumbai Indians vs Kolkata Knight Riders

summary: The Sheffield Shield 2024-25 Final between Victoria and South Australia is concluding today, March 29, 2026, with Victoria needing 94 runs to win. The IPL 2026 Match 2 between Mumbai Indians and Kolkata Knight Riders has concluded, with MI winning.
